title: Uruguayan Lamb Skewers with Crispy Crunchy Crust
description: A French-inspired twist on traditional Uruguayan lamb skewers, topped with a crunchy crust for added texture.

ingredients.name: skewers
ingredients.notes: soak in water for 30 minutes before use

instructions: Thread lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush skewers with olive oil and sprinkle with minced garlic and dried thyme.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Roll lamb cubes in crushed crackers or breadcrumbs to create a crunchy crust.
Place skewers on grill and cook for 8-10 minutes per side, or until lamb reaches an internal temperature of 63°C/145°F.
Remove from grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
